name: Dead Survival: Zombie Shooter
description: Dive into Dead Survival: Zombie Shooter, the ultimate offline zombie shooting game designed for intense action and survival horror fans. Battle through a post-apocalyptic world overrun by the undead. With stunning graphics, powerful weapons, and smart zombie AI, every second is a fight for survival.
instructions: WASD rarr Move Left Mouse Click rarr Shoot Right Mouse Click rarr Scope Middle Mouse rarr Switch Weapon R rarr Reload Z rarr Lock cursor ESC rarr Unlock cursor
